title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at BLK-Max Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
